topStories.description: The ongoing US-Israeli war on Iran is the most unpopular conflict in US history, impacting Trump's midterm election prospects. Vice President Vance and Secretary Rubio are potential candidates for succession, with their political fortunes tied to the war's developments and Trump's decisions.

topStories.title: Congress releases list of 284 candidates, names Adhir Ranjan Chowdhury from Baharampur
topStories.description: Congress has named Pradip Prasad from Bhabanipur, where Mamata successfully contested last time. The list also included former MP Mausam Noor from Malatipur.

topStories.title: US DHS shutdown hits record 44 days as Senate deadlock stalls funding, TSA crisis continues
topStories.description: Prospects for a swift resolution remain bleak. The Senate is not scheduled to reconvene until April 13, while the House is out until April 14.

topStories.title: Iran ‘hits’ US AWACS, air tankers: What else has it targeted in past month?
topStories.description: Iran reportedly hits E-3 Sentry flying radars, which track drones, missiles, aircraft from hundreds of kilometres away.

topStories.title: Middle East conflict: Pakistan hosts quadrilateral summit with Egypt, Saudi, Turkiye's leaders; here's what's on agenda
topStories.description: Pakistan on Sunday (local time) is hosting a quadrilateral summit with the foreign ministers of Egypt, Saudi Arabia, and Turkiye. The meeting comes days after Pakistan presented Islamabad as a possible venue for talks between the US and Iran to bring an end to the four-week-long war.

topStories.title: The US-Israeli war on humanity
topStories.description: The lawlessness and brutality of the US-Israeli genocide in Gaza have now spread to other parts of the world.

topStories.title: Iran Says It Obliterated American AWACS Aircraft In Saudi Airbase Strike
topStories.description: Multiple refuelling aircraft were also damaged in the attack.

topStories.title: Pakistan hosts four-nation bid to encourage US, Iran towards diplomacy
topStories.description: Top diplomats of Pakistan, Egypt, Saudi Arabia and Turkiye meet to prepare ground for de-escalation in war on Iran.

topStories.title: ‘We will see a new government in Venezuela, in Cuba and in Iran’
topStories.description: Senator Ted Cruz says US President Donald Trump’s approach could lead to government changes in Venezuela, Cuba and Iran.

topStories.title: Iran accuses US of ‘secretly plotting ground attack’ while engaging in negotiations to end the war
topStories.description: Iran's parliament Speaker Ghalibaf accused the US of planning a ground attack while engaging in diplomatic talks. He called for unity among Iranians and emphasized Iran's capability to retaliate against the US and its allies amid escalating military tensions in the region.

dailyNews.title: Congress has betrayed minorities only to gain power, says Vijayendra
dailyNews.description: The BJP, on the other hand, believes in Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s idea of Sab ka Saat, Sab ka Vikas, according to State unit president

dailyNews.title: US Stocks Markets | Lucrative bets that anticipated Trump's policy surprises warrant scrutiny, experts say
dailyNews.description: Well-timed trades ahead of U.S. President Donald Trump's major policy surprises ​during his second term have potentially led to millions of dollars in profits for unknown ​traders, leading some legal experts to say they should be investigated to protect fair markets and ascertain whether information is leaking.

dailyNews.title: Cash aid,  ₹25 lakh health cover, land rights: Kharge unveils Assam Congress manifesto
dailyNews.description: Congress national president Mallikarjun Kharge announces 5 guarantees for Assam, including cash aid,  ₹25L health cover, land rights, and support for women and seniors ahead of polls

dailyNews.title: Dozens detained in Tel Aviv as anti-war protest turns violent
dailyNews.description: Police in Tel Aviv dispersed protesters opposing the US-Israeli war on Iran on Saturday. Up to 18 people were arrested.

dailyNews.title: Pentagon readies for weeks of US ground operations in Iran: Report
dailyNews.description: Uncertainty looms over Trump's approval of the Pentagon's plans for limited ground operations in Iran's strategic regions.

dailyNews.title: US-Israel war on Iran: What’s happening on day 30 of attacks?
dailyNews.description: Foreign ministers from Pakistan, Turkiye, Egypt and Saudi Arabia hold talks in Islamabad to end US-Israel war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Arizona advances to men's Final Four for first time since 2001
dailyNews.description: The Arizona Wildcats defeated the Purdue Boilermakers in their regional final to advance to the Final Four of the men's NCAA Basketball Tournament.

dailyNews.title: 'Burn Notice' star ditched Los Angeles for Colorado after meeting his wife and says he's 'never leaving'
dailyNews.description: "Burn Notice" star Jeffrey Donovan says Colorado is the true sunshine state as he raises his three kids there and has no plans to ever leave.

dailyNews.title: Republicans can fund ICE for an entire decade without a single Dem vote: Sen Cruz
dailyNews.description: Sen. Ted Cruz says Republicans can fund ICE for a decade using reconciliation, bypassing Democrats who he claims will never again vote to fund the agency.

dailyNews.title: Executed killer’s chilling claim about what she felt during pickax murders still haunts retired FBI agent
dailyNews.description: Retired FBI profiler Candice DeLong says Karla Faye Tucker's troubled childhood and drug use doomed her long before the 1983 pickaxe murders that sent her to death row.

dailyNews.title: IndyCar star Will Power crashes hard into wall during qualifying
dailyNews.description: IndyCar star Will Power crashed head-on into the wall during qualifying for the Children's of Alabama Indy Grand Prix on Saturday afternoon.

dailyNews.title: MAPPED: Where gas prices are rising the fastest from the Iran conflict
dailyNews.description: Gasoline, diesel and jet fuel prices have jumped as the conflict between the U.S., Israel and Iran squeezes oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Catholic conversions rise as young adults 'hungry for truth' turn to faith and reject secularism, bishop says
dailyNews.description: Catholic dioceses across the U.S. are reporting record adult converts, with Bishop Robert Barron saying young adults are leading a return to faith.

topStories.title: Pentagon readies for weeks of US ground operations in Iran: Report
topStories.description: Uncertainty looms over Trump's approval of the Pentagon's plans for limited ground operations in Iran's strategic regions.

topStories.title: Iran responds to reports US weighing ground operations: 'We will never accept humiliation'
topStories.description: Iran's parliament speaker vows never to accept "humiliation" as the Pentagon reportedly prepares ground force options near the Strait of Hormuz for Trump.

topStories.title: 5 Takeaways From the ‘No Kings’ Rallies as the Midterms Heat Up
topStories.description: The war in Iran was a galvanizing force, but plenty of protesters focused on President Trump’s immigration crackdown. Senate candidates in several key races joined the crowds.

topStories.title: ‘No Kings’ Protests Decry Trump and His Agenda
topStories.description: Thousands of organized demonstrations stretched across the country. Minnesota was a focal point of the protests after a tumultuous immigration crackdown.

topStories.title: No Kings Protests Held Across the U.S.: Photos and Videos
topStories.description: It’s the third time that the coalition behind the “No Kings” movement has organized events to protest President Trump and his policies. In the United States, more than 3,000 demonstrations were planned.

topStories.title: Record Number of T.S.A. Employees Called Out on Friday
topStories.description: President Trump signed a memo late Friday ordering the Department of Homeland Security to restore pay to airport screeners.

topStories.title: Sen. Rand Paul on breaking away from Senate Republicans over some of Trump's policies
topStories.description: As chairman of the Homeland Security Committee, Sen. Rand Paul is at the center of some of the country's most critical debates. He speaks with Robert Costa about why he doesn't support President Trump's decision to launch strikes in Iran and how he feels about new Department of Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin.

topStories.title: Trump ban on investor homebuying may come at cost of a bigger real estate deal
topStories.description: President Trump's plan to ban big investors from home ownership may not be the key to reviving the American Dream in affordable housing legislation.

topStories.title: Not everyone can expect a bigger tax refund this year — what's actually driving your result
topStories.description: President Donald Trump has said this will be the "largest tax refund season of all time," as a result of his "big beautiful bill." Here's what the megabill means for taxpayers.

dailyNews.title: How the big oil and gas CEOs think the Iran war supply disruption will play out
dailyNews.description: The oil industry's grim outlook for global oil and gas supplies stands in contrast to the Trump administration's promise that the disruption is short term.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Trump fans at CPAC hope for the best in Iran but worry over the cost at home
dailyNews.description: The U.S. war with Iran hung over CPAC, the annual conservative conference, where attendees said they trust Trump while hoping the conflict ends soon.

dailyNews.title: Left in limbo, Afghans who served with the U.S. fear Trump could send them back to the Taliban
dailyNews.description: On a former U.S. military base in Qatar, Afghans who supported the United States in its 20-year war against the Taliban have been left in limbo, living in windowless shipping containers far from the new lives they were once promised in the U.S.Now, the Trump administration is presenting them with a stark choice: move to an unspecified third country or return to Taliban-ruled Afghanistan, where they potentially face persecution, imprisonment or death

dailyNews.title: Pentagon prepares for weeks of ground operations in Iran
dailyNews.description: If President Trump approves the plans, such an effort would mark a new phase of the war that could be significantly more dangerous to U.S. troops than the first four weeks.

dailyNews.title: MAGA’s eruption has so far kept Trump from endorsing in key Senate race
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump seemed set to endorse Sen. John Cornyn in the Texas Republican primary runoff. But strong opposition from MAGA activists forestalled that.

dailyNews.title: Trump ratchets up attacks on NATO, says U.S. no longer needs alliance
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump suggested the U.S. might move away from its commitment to defend NATO allies, criticizing them for not supporting the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: As Trump feels pressure to end war, allies fear what Iran may do next
dailyNews.description: The oil price rose to $110 per barrel on Friday, as Iran has demonstrated it can inflict significant damage on the world’s economy, even while outgunned. That creates a dilemma for President Trump.

dailyNews.title: Judge agrees to dismiss charges against officers tied to Breonna Taylor raid
dailyNews.description: Attorneys for Taylor’s family sharply denounced the Trump administration’s push to drop the charges.
